reason: Rebuild South Africa VAT on one reviewed engine across English, French, Swahili and the widget. The engine applies the current 15% standard rate for add and extract calculations, keeps confirmed section 11 zero-rated and section 12 exempt treatment distinct, and treats custom rates as non-statutory scenarios. Its current registration screen uses the SARS thresholds effective 1 April 2026: compulsory review above R2.3 million and voluntary range above R120,000 through R2.3 million over an uninterrupted or rolling 12 months. The effective date records this threshold contract, not the historical start date of the 15% standard rate. No protected golden fixture existed, so the route and engine digest changes have no carried result delta.
